description: Input schema for Kling O3 Text-to-Video.

prompt.description: The text prompt describing the video to generate.
examples: A cinematic drone shot over a misty mountain range at sunrise
prompt.title: Prompt

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio of the generated video.

duration.description: Duration of the video in seconds (3-15).

shot_type.description: Shot type control. 'customize' for manual prompt control, 'intelligent' for AI-driven camera work.

generate_audio.description: Whether to generate audio for the video.
generate_audio.title: Generate Audio

title: AppInput
